channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Foo Fighters Unwrap ‘Your Favorite Toy’: Stream It Now
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to the show, music fans. Today, we're talking about one of the biggest names in rock - Foo Fighters. Their brand new album, 'Your Favorite Toy', is out now and we've got the details.
[Short music clip from Foo Fighters]
Host: "This is the band's 12th studio album, and according to frontman Dave Grohl, it's 'the most fun we've had making a record in years'. The album features 10 tracks, including the previously released 'Caught In The Echo', the title track, and 'All of the People', which they recently performed live at a historic church in Ireland.
[Short music clip from "All of the People"]
Host: "The album was recorded at home and co-produced by the band and Oliver Roman. And, it marks the recorded debut of new drummer Ilan Rubin. As Dave Grohl describes it, the album is 'loud, it's melodic, it's weird in places... but it feels like us. It feels alive'.
[Short music clip from Foo Fighters]
Host: "To celebrate the album's release, Foo Fighters will be performing on Saturday Night Live UK on April 25th, and kicking off their world tour with a sold-out show in the US on April 28th. They'll then be touring across Europe, North America, Australia, and New Zealand throughout the year.
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's all for today. Make sure to check out Foo Fighters' new album 'Your Favorite Toy' and catch them on tour. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll see you next time."
